name: Checkbox
searchText: checkbox capture boolean input from user @mantine/core /core/checkbox autocontrast color description error icon iconcolor id indeterminate label labelposition radius rootref size witherrorstyles wrapperprops autocontrast checked color disabled icon iconcolor indeterminate radius size checked defaultchecked onchange radius value withborder

props.name: autoContrast
props.description: If set, adjusts icon color based on background color for filled variant

props.name: color
props.description: Key of theme.colors or any valid CSS color to set input background color in checked state

props.name: description
props.description: Description below the label

props.name: error
props.description: Error message below the label

props.name: icon
props.description: Icon for checked or indeterminate state

props.name: iconColor
props.description: Key of theme.colors or any valid CSS color to set icon color. By default, depends on theme.autoContrast.

props.name: id
props.description: Unique input id

props.name: indeterminate
props.description: Indeterminate state of the checkbox. If set, checked prop is dismissed.

props.name: label
props.description: label associated with the checkbox

props.name: labelPosition
props.description: Position of the label relative to the input

props.name: radius
props.description: Key of theme.radius or any valid CSS value to set border-radius

props.name: rootRef
props.description: Root element ref

props.name: size
props.description: Controls size of the component

props.name: withErrorStyles
props.description: If set, applies error styles to the checkbox when error prop is set

props.name: wrapperProps
props.description: Props passed down to the root element

props.name: autoContrast
props.description: If set, adjusts icon color based on background color for filled variant

props.name: checked
props.description: Determines whether the component should have checked styles

props.name: color
props.description: Key of theme.colors or any valid CSS color to set input background color in checked state

props.name: disabled
props.description: Indicates disabled state

props.name: icon
props.description: Icon for checked or indeterminate state

props.name: iconColor
props.description: Key of theme.colors or any valid CSS color to set icon color, by default value depends on theme.autoContrast

props.name: indeterminate
props.description: Indeterminate state of the checkbox. If set, checked prop is ignored.

props.name: radius
props.description: Key of theme.radius or any valid CSS value to set border-radius

props.name: size
props.description: Controls size of the component

props.name: checked
props.description: Controlled component value

props.name: defaultChecked
props.description: Uncontrolled component default value

props.name: onChange
props.description: Called when value changes

props.name: radius
props.description: Key of theme.radius or any valid CSS value to set border-radius, numbers are converted to rem

props.name: value
props.description: Value of the checkbox, used with Checkbox.Group

props.name: withBorder
props.description: Adds border to the root element
